Class BoxedMutableByteList

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.collections.impl.AbstractRichIterable<Byte>
org.eclipse.collections.impl.collection.mutable.AbstractMutableCollection<Byte>
org.eclipse.collections.impl.list.mutable.AbstractMutableList<Byte>
org.eclipse.collections.impl.list.mutable.primitive.BoxedMutableByteList
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, Iterable<Byte>, Collection<Byte>, List<Byte>, RandomAccess, MutableCollection<Byte>, InternalIterable<Byte>, ListIterable<Byte>, MutableList<Byte>, OrderedIterable<Byte>, ReversibleIterable<Byte>, RichIterable<Byte>
public class BoxedMutableByteList extends AbstractMutableList<Byte> implements MutableList<Byte>, RandomAccess
A boxed view of a MutableByteList. This is for scenarios where optimization is not a consideration and therefore no further methods will be optimized.

This file was automatically generated from template file boxedPrimitiveList.stg.

Since:
12.0

    Returns the item at the specified position in this list iterable.

    Returns the index of the first occurrence of the specified item in this iterable, or -1 if this iterable does not contain the item.
    int

    Returns the index of the last occurrence of the specified item in this list, or -1 if this list does not contain the item.
